use_cases: SaaS landing pages with animated visual elements to capture user attention
Product marketing pages featuring dynamic hero sections with gradient effects
Portfolio or showcase sites using jelly-like animated blur backgrounds
ai_summary: A visually striking hero component featuring an animated jelly blur effect with vibrant blue glow against a dark gradient background. The section includes scroll-triggered zoom-out animations via AOS library, with gradient text headlines and a modern SaaS-oriented messaging layout designed for landing pages.
